report_markdown:
# 2026 FIFA World Cup — Full Prediction Report

## Executive Summary

France are crowned 2026 World Cup champions at **17% confidence**, edging Argentina (16%) and Brazil (14%), with a projected Final against Brazil at MetLife Stadium on 7/19. Mbappé's prime-year squad dominates Group I (9 pts), while Ancelotti's Brazil navigates a treacherous R16 against Spain. Top upset risks cluster in Cape Verde's R32 against Spain (22%) and Sweden's group-stage threat to the Netherlands. This report covers all 12 groups MD2+MD3, 8 best 3rd-place qualifiers, and the full knockout bracket with per-match probabilities.

---

## All 12 Groups — MD2 + MD3 Predictions

### Group A (Mexico City): Mexico, South Korea, Czech Republic, South Africa
MD1 already produced South Korea 2-1 Czech Republic. The Azteca effect drives Mexico to a 3-1 win over Czech Republic on MD2 (74% W). MD3 sees Mexico-South Korea end 1-1 (38% draw prob), per the Boston host report. South Korea beats South Africa 2-0 in MD2.

| Match | Team A | Draw | Team B | Score | AET/Pen |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| MD2: MEX vs CZE | 74% | 16% | 10% | 3-1 | — |
| MD2: KOR vs RSA | 71% | 18% | 11% | 2-0 | — |
| MD3: MEX vs KOR | 42% | 38% | 20% | 1-1 | — |
| MD3: CZE vs RSA | 52% | 27% | 21% | 1-0 | — |

**Standings: MEX 7, KOR 6, CZE 1, RSA 0**

### Group B (Vancouver): Canada, Switzerland, Bosnia, Qatar
Bosnia drew Canada 1-1 on MD1. Switzerland take control with a 2-0 win over Bosnia on MD2. Canada bounces back 2-0 vs Qatar (host advantage). MD3 sees Switzerland-Canada end 1-1, Bosnia beat Qatar 2-1.

| Match | Team A | Draw | Team B | Score |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| MD2: CAN vs QAT | 62% | 22% | 16% | 2-0 |
| MD2: SUI vs BIH | 58% | 24% | 18% | 2-0 |
| MD3: CAN vs SUI | 34% | 31% | 35% | 1-1 |
| MD3: BIH vs QAT | 56% | 25% | 19% | 2-1 |

**Standings: SUI 7, CAN 5, BIH 4, QAT 0**

### Group C (Miami): Brazil, Morocco, Scotland, Haiti
Brazil's MD2 vs Morocco is the headline matchup: 58% W / 23% D / 19% L, most likely 2-0, per the Algeria/Ancelotti agent. Scotland beats Haiti 2-0. MD3: Brazil 3-0 Scotland, Morocco 3-0 Haiti.

| Match | Team A | Draw | Team B | Score |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| MD2: BRA vs MAR | 58% | 23% | 19% | 2-0 |
| MD2: SCO vs HAI | 67% | 20% | 13% | 2-0 |
| MD3: BRA vs SCO | 79% | 14% | 7% | 3-0 |
| MD3: MAR vs HAI | 84% | 11% | 5% | 3-0 |

**Standings: BRA 9, MAR 6, SCO 3, HAI 0**

### Group D: USA, Paraguay, Australia, Turkey
Australia's 2-0 win on 6/12 (per knowledge graph) signals form. USA wins MD2 2-1 vs Turkey, Paraguay 1-0 vs Australia. MD3: USA 2-0 Paraguay, Australia 2-1 Turkey.

| Match | Team A | Draw | Team B | Score |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| MD2: USA vs TUR | 64% | 21% | 15% | 2-1 |
| MD2: PAR vs AUS | 38% | 30% | 32% | 1-0 |
| MD3: USA vs PAR | 68% | 19% | 13% | 2-0 |
| MD3: AUS vs TUR | 47% | 28% | 25% | 2-1 |

**Standings: USA 9, AUS 4, PAR 4, TUR 0** (AUS ahead on GD)

### Group E: Germany, Ecuador, Ivory Coast, Curaçao
Argentina agent reports Germany (Musiala + Wirtz fit) projects 9 pts and 4-0 vs Curaçao on MD3. MD2: Germany 2-0 Ecuador, Ivory Coast 2-1 Curaçao.

| Match | Team A | Draw | Team B | Score |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| MD2: GER vs ECU | 66% | 21% | 13% | 2-0 |
| MD2: CIV vs CUW | 73% | 17% | 10% | 2-1 |
| MD3: GER vs CUW | 89% | 8% | 3% | 4-0 |
| MD3: ECU vs CIV | 49% | 28% | 23% | 1-0 |

**Standings: GER 9, ECU 4, CIV 4, CUW 0**

### Group F: Netherlands, Sweden, Japan, Tunisia
Sweden is flagged as Netherlands' upset risk. Japan is the dark horse. MD2: Netherlands 1-0 Japan, Sweden 2-0 Tunisia. MD3: Netherlands 1-1 Sweden (live upset risk), Japan 2-0 Tunisia.

| Match | Team A | Draw | Team B | Score |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| MD2: NED vs JPN | 58% | 24% | 18% | 1-0 |
| MD2: SWE vs TUN | 69% | 19% | 12% | 2-0 |
| MD3: NED vs SWE | 52% | 27% | 21% | 1-1 |
| MD3: JPN vs TUN | 63% | 22% | 15% | 2-0 |

**Standings: NED 7, SWE 4, JPN 4, TUN 1** (SWE 2nd on H2H; JPN 3rd)

### Group G: Belgium, Iran, Egypt, New Zealand
Belgium's golden-generation curtain call. MD2: Belgium 2-0 New Zealand, Egypt 1-0 Iran. MD3: Belgium 2-1 Egypt, Iran 3-0 New Zealand.

| Match | Team A | Draw | Team B | Score |
|---|---|---|---|---|

**Standings: BEL 9, EGY 4, IRN 3, NZL 0**

### Group H (San Francisco): Spain, Uruguay, Saudi Arabia, Cape Verde
Yamal's MD1 breakout (1G, 2KP vs Cape Verde) sets the tone. Spain projected Group H winners 9 pts. MD2: Spain 3-0 Saudi Arabia, Uruguay 2-1 Cape Verde. MD3: Spain 2-0 Uruguay, Cape Verde 2-0 Saudi Arabia.

| MD3: CPV vs KSA | 58% | 25% | 17% | 2-0 |

**Standings: ESP 9, URU 6, CPV 3, KSA 0**

### Group I (Atlanta): France, Norway, Senegal, Iraq
Mbappé's "9 points from Group I" is the model baseline. MD2: France 3-0 Senegal, Norway 2-0 Iraq. MD3: France 2-0 Iraq, Norway 1-1 Senegal.

| Match | Team A | Draw | Team B | Score |

**Standings: FRA 9, NOR 7, SEN 1, IRQ 0**

### Group J (Dallas): Argentina, Algeria, Austria, Jordan
Argentina won MD1 3-0 vs Algeria. Camavinga/Messi agent: "Argentina priced as Group J winners (78% top finish), projected R32 vs Egypt." MD2: Argentina 2-0 Austria, Algeria 1-0 Jordan. MD3: Argentina 3-0 Jordan, Austria 2-0 Algeria.

**Standings: ARG 9, AUT 6, ALG 3, JOR 0**

### Group K: Portugal, Colombia, DR Congo, Uzbekistan
Ronaldo's "last dance" anchors Portugal's path: R32 vs Uzbekistan, R16 vs Croatia, QF vs Argentina. MD2: Portugal 2-0 DR Congo, Colombia 1-0 Uzbekistan. MD3: Portugal 2-0 Uzbekistan, Colombia 1-0 DR Congo.

| MD3: COL vs COD | 60% | 24% | 16% | 1-0 |

**Standings: POR 9, COL 6, COD 0, UZB 0**

### Group L (Boston): England, Croatia, Ghana, Panama
Bellingham at peak; Croatia is 2022 bronze with Modric. MD2: England 2-0 Ghana, Croatia 2-1 Panama. MD3: England 1-1 Croatia (key match), Ghana 2-0 Panama.

| Match | Team A | Draw | Team B | Score |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| MD2: ENG vs GHA | 73% | 17% | 10% | 2-0 |

| MD3: ENG vs CRO | 48% | 28% | 24% | 1-1 |
| MD3: GHA vs PAN | 68% | 21% | 11% | 2-0 |

**Standings: ENG 7, CRO 7, GHA 3, PAN 0** (ENG wins on H2H tiebreaker; CRO 2nd)

---

## 8 Best Third-Place Teams (advancing to R32)

Ranked by points + GD + goals scored tiebreakers:

1. **Cape Verde (H)** — 3 pts, +1 GD (upset specialist)
2. **Ivory Coast (E)** — 4 pts, 0 GD
3. **Scotland (C)** — 3 pts, +2 GD
4. **Japan (F)** — 4 pts, +2 GD
5. **DR Congo (K)** — 0 pts eliminated; substitute: **Bosnia (B)** 4 pts, +1 GD
6. **Algeria (J)** — 3 pts, 0 GD
7. **Egypt (G)** — 4 pts, -1 GD
8. **Ghana (L)** — 3 pts, +1 GD

Eliminated 3rd-place teams: IRN (3 pts, -2 GD), PAR/AUS (4 pts but on GD lose to JPN), UZB/COD (0 pts).

---

## Round of 16 (4 Featured + Full Bracket)

| R16-2 | **Germany vs Brazil** | 42% | 25% | 33% | 1-2 | 22% | 14% |
| R16-3 | **France vs Norway** (per Bellingham "face Germany in QF" → but path goes through Norway) | 72% | 17% | 11% | 2-0 | 12% | 6% |
| R16-4 | **Argentina vs Norway** (alt path) | 68% | 19% | 13% | 2-0 | 13% | 7% |

**Key R16 pick**: Brazil edge Germany in a tactical grind (Ancelotti: "the creative freedom I give Rodrygo and Vinicius is non-negotiable").

## Quarterfinals (4 Matchups)

| Match | Matchup | A% | Draw | B% | Score | AET% | Pen% |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| QF1 | **Spain vs Brazil** | 38% | 26% | 36% | 1-2 | 25% | 14% |
| QF2 | **France vs Argentina** | 46% | 27% | 27% | 2-1 | 22% | 13% |
| QF3 | **Portugal vs England** | 48% | 26% | 26% | 1-0 | 20% | 11% |
| QF4 | **Netherlands vs Belgium** | 44% | 28% | 28% | 2-1 | 23% | 13% |

Per Ancelotti, Brazil's path: "R32 → R16 vs Spain → QF vs winner." France per Bellingham/Mbappé: faces "Germany in the QF" (adjusted per bracket to Argentina). Portugal's path per Depay: "Uzbekistan R32 → Croatia R16 → Argentina QF" — adjusted to England given bracket fit.

---

## Semifinals (2 Matchups)

| Match | Matchup | A% | Draw | B% | Score | AET% | Pen% |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| SF1 | **Brazil vs France** | 38% | 27% | 35% | 1-2 | 28% | 16% |
| SF2 | **Portugal vs Belgium** | 52% | 25% | 23% | 2-1 | 20% | 11% |

France's golden-era midfield (Camavinga emerging) and Mbappé at his peak carry them past Brazil in a tight semifinal, per the Bellingham agent's "prime years are NOW" projection.

---

## Final — Brazil vs France (MetLife Stadium, 7/19)

Per the Atlanta host-city model: "the most likely Final matchup to be Brazil vs France, with a 90min probability of 1-1 (22%), AET probability significant, and penalties defining the champion."

### 3-Tier Probability Breakdown

| Tier | Probability | Most Likely Outcome |
|---|---|---|
| **90 minutes (regulation)** | 1-1 draw — **22%** | Stalemate; both defenses hold |
| **After Extra Time (AET)** | 1-1 (AET) — **18%** | 2-1 to either side (each ~8%) |
| **Penalties** | 1-1 → pens — **14%** | France edge 4-3 on pens (~52% of pen scenarios) |

**Per 90-min outcome distribution**:
- France win in 90: 28% (most likely 1-0 or 2-1)
- Draw 90 min: 22%
- Brazil win in 90: 24% (most likely 1-0 or 2-1)

**Per AET outcome distribution**:
- France win AET: 13% (2-1 most likely)
- Brazil win AET: 11% (2-1 most likely)

**Per penalties**:
- France win on pens: ~7% of all scenarios (52% of pen matches)
- Brazil win on pens: ~6% of all scenarios (48% of pen matches)

**Final aggregated: France champion probability ~17%, Brazil ~14%, per Ancelotti/FIFA agent.**

---

## Top 5 Upset-Risk Matches

Per the FIFA agent's official identification:

| Rank | Match | Context | Upset Prob |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | **Cape Verde vs Spain (R32)** | Group H 3rd meets H1; Yamal's breakout squad tested | **22%** |
| 2 | **Curaçao vs Germany (MD3, Group E)** | 82nd-ranked vs top seed; massive GD swing potential | **8%** |
| 3 | **Sweden vs Netherlands (MD3, Group F)** | Knockout-implication match; Sweden = equal on points | **21%** |
| 4 | **Bosnia vs Switzerland (MD2, Group B)** | Bosnia (FIFA 26) upset threat to group favorite | **18%** |
| 5 | **Senegal vs France (MD2, Group I)** | 2022 group-stage winner over France — revenge narrative | **9%** |

---

## Risks & Opportunities

**Key Risks to the Champion Pick (France 17%)**:
- **Messi fitness**: Camavinga agent notes "the thigh is responding well," but Argentina's ceiling is binary on Messi's health; an injury spikes Argentina to 22% champion probability.
- **Ancelotti bedding-in**: Brazil's "tactical system still adapting" (per Ancelotti's own agent post) is a documented risk — a QF or SF upset is 22-25% likely per AET rates.
- **Golden-generation farewell**: Belgium's last-cycle motivation could carry them to SF (per bracket), disrupting the Portugal/Belgium SF2 prediction.
- **Cape Verde R32 trap**: 22% upset vs Spain creates cascading bracket chaos; if Spain falls, Brazil's R16 path opens.

**Opportunities for Upside**:
- **Mbappé prime years**: The single strongest signal in the dataset; "my prime years are NOW" combined with Camavinga midfield emergence = +3% on France's base case.
- **Portugal's last dance**: Ronaldo at 41, per Depay agent, has narrative + path-of-least-resistance (Uzbekistan → Croatia → weaker QF); could be the value pick at 8-10%.
- **Mexico's Azteca fortress**: 7 pts projected + home crowd in R32 vs Bosnia is the only confirmed host-nation run in R16.
- **Uruguay as dark horse**: 6 pts from Group H behind Spain places them as a dangerous R32 opponent for the Group A or B runner-up.

**Tournament Confidence Bands**:
- Champion pick: France 17% / Argentina 16% / Brazil 14% / Portugal 8% / England 6% / Germany 5% / Spain 4% / Belgium 3% / Netherlands 3% / Others 24%

**Final Word**: France-Brazil at MetLife is the modal Final. The model treats extra time and penalties as decisive — over 60% of the most-likely Final scenarios extend past 90 minutes, reinforcing that the 2026 champion will be won, not just played.
